ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the geographic area */,
  "area" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period in which the data was collected (e.g., year-quarter) */,
  "qtrly_estabs" INTEGER /* Number of establishments for the period */,
  "avg_wkly_wage" REAL /* Average weekly wage for the period */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the area for the period */,
  "employment_growth_rate" REAL /* Percentage growth in employment compared to the previous period */,
  "wage_growth_rate" REAL /* Percentage growth in average weekly wages compared to the previous period */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Identifier for the source of the data (e.g., BLS, Census Bureau) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data version management */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_code", "period")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the geographic area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Full name of the area */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the area is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of area (e.g., county, city, state) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data version management */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., year-quarter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data version management */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric entry */,
  "qtrly_estabs" INTEGER /* Number of establishments for the quarter */,
  "avg_wkly_wage" REAL /* Average weekly wage for the quarter */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees across all establishments */,
  "total_wages" REAL /* Total wages paid across all establishments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data version management */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_metrics_qtrly_estabs FOREIGN KEY ("qtrly_estabs") REFERENCES employment_data ("qtrly_estabs")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for data version management */,
  "audit_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
